title: 2025-26 Gamethread #61: New Jersey Devils vs. Florida Panthers
fullText: Story byNEWARK, NEW JERSEY - OCTOBER 16: Jack Hughes #86 of the New Jersey Devils looks on during the second period against the Florida Panthers at Prudential Center on October 16, 2025 in Newark, New Jersey. (Photo by Sarah Stier/Getty Images) | Getty ImagesThe Matchup: New Jersey Devils (29-29-2) versus the Florida Panthers (30-27-3)The Time: 7:00 pm ESTThe Broadcast: TV — TNT, HBO Max; Radio — Devils Hockey NetworkThe Game Preview: I had it here.AdvertisementThe Rules: If you have been a reader here, you already know the rules. But for the rest, a reminder: please do not swear in the comment section, and keep comments relevant to the hockey game going on. Beyond that, do not attack any other commenters, and do not ask for or pass along illegal streams on this board.LGD!
summary: The New Jersey Devils are under .500 under Sheldon Keefe this season.
